title: ProDec Super Absorbent Cellulose Sponge Holds 20x Its Weight in Water, Ideal for Decorating, Wallpaper Hanging, Tile Grouting, Vehicle Cleaning, Washing Down, Sugar Soaping & More - Large Size
features: Premium quality 100% cellulose for super high absorbency compared to foam sponges - holds up to 20 times its own weight in water
High resistance to tearing for long life
Ideal for decorating, washing down, sugar soaping of surfaces, paperhanging, tile grouting and general cleaning tasks
Can also be used with glazes to create special effects
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Cellulose sponges - settle only for the best A sponge is a useful thing to keep handy when decorating and especially when wallpapering. This trade quality sponge is made from 100% natural cellulose which is both more durable and more absorbent than foam sponges, holding up to 20 times its own weight in water. It is ideal for washing down surfaces to remove loose dirt and debris, tile grouting, caulking, sugar or detergent soaping of wallpaper prior to removal, applying wallpaper, removing excess paste and can also be used with decorative glazes to create special effects. Cellulose sponges are also ideal for a wide variety of general cleaning tasks: the soft natural cellulose won't mark or damage delicate or high sheen surfaces such as furniture or vehicle bodywork, wiping them clean for a pristine finish. Wiping and cleaning solutions from ProDec Wiping down, cleaning up - they're part of most decorating jobs and much more besides, and ProDec has a range of products to help with these essential tasks. Sponges ProDec has both natural cellulose sponges, which hold up to 20 times their own weight in water, and synthetic foam sponges. As well as being useful for general purpose wiping and cleaning, they're handy to have when wallpapering, to wipe away excess paste and help smooth papers down. Rags Always handy to have on any number of jobs, ProDec rags are made from soft, high quality lint free fabric that won't leave any marks, making them suitable for wiping up spills and splashes to applying wax finishes and dyes to wood, general cleaning and more. Cloths A range of cloths for absorbing spills, wiping, polishing and buffing surfaces. Stockinette roll 100% super soft scratch-free cotton with an open weave that makes it absorbent and strong, stockinette roll is ideal for general wiping tasks, mopping up liquid drips and spills, dusting and cleaning, as well as polishing a wide range of surfaces such as windows, varnished wood, mirrors.
